children.heading: Authority to regulate
children.label: a Authority to regulate
children.text: The Commission shall have no authority under this chapter to regulate any risk of injury associated with a consumer product if such risk could be eliminated or reduced to a sufficient extent by actions taken under the Occupational Safety and Health Act of 1970 [ et seq.]; the Atomic Energy Act of 1954 [ et seq.]; or the Clean Air Act [ et seq.]. The Commission shall have no authority under this chapter to regulate any risk of injury associated with electronic product radiation emitted from an electronic product (as such terms are defined by sections 355(1) and (2) of the Public Health Service Act) if such risk of injury may be subjected to regulation under subpart 3 of part F of title III of the Public Health Service Act.29 U.S.C. 65142 U.S.C. 201142 U.S.C. 740111See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Certain notices of proposed rulemaking; duties of Chronic Hazard Advisory Panel
children.label: b Certain notices of proposed rulemaking; duties of Chronic Hazard Advisory Panel
A
children.text: an advance notice of proposed rulemaking for a consumer product safety rule,

children.label: B
children.text: a notice of proposed rulemaking for a rule under , orsection 2076(e) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: an advance notice of proposed rulemaking for regulations under ,section 1261(q)(1) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: a rule under , orsection 2076(e) of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: a regulation under ,section 1261(q)(1) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: When the Commission appoints a Panel, the Panel shall convene within 30 days after the date the final appointment is made to the Panel. The Panel shall report its determination to the Commission not later than 120 days after the date the Panel is convened or, if the Panel requests additional time, within a time period specified by the Commission. If the determination reported to the Commission states that a substance in a product is a carcinogen, mutagen, or a teratogen, the Panel shall include in its report an estimate, if such an estimate is feasible, of the probable harm to human health that will result from exposure to the substance.

children.label: C
children.text: A Panel appointed under shall terminate when it has submitted its report unless the Commission extends the existence of the Panel.section 2077 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: Chapter 10 of title 5 shall not apply with respect to any Panel established under this section.

children.heading: Panel report; incorporation into advance notice and final rule
children.label: c Panel report; incorporation into advance notice and final rule
children.text: Each Panel’s report shall contain a complete statement of the basis for the Panel’s determination. The Commission shall consider the report of the Panel and incorporate such report into the advance notice of proposed rulemaking and final rule.
